author: mdelobelle
description: Give your notes typed, validated properties with guided input — define reusable note types, like a schema for your frontmatter. Successor to Metadata Menu, powered by Bases. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: mdelobelle
manifest.description: Typed, validated note properties with guided input — reusable note types, a schema for your frontmatter. Successor to Metadata Menu, powered by Bases.
manifest.name: Fileclass

name: Fileclass

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Chore/issue templates by @mdelobelle in https://github.com/mdelobelle/fileclass/pull/12
* fix: label sync via gh label create --force by @mdelobelle in https://github.com/mdelobelle/fileclass/pull/14
* fix: label sync via raw REST upsert by @mdelobelle in https://github.com/mdelobelle/fileclass/pull/15
* fix: quote label colors (yq float trap) by @mdelobelle in https://github.com/mdelobelle/fileclass/pull/16
* docs: document conditional link-field candidates by @mdelobelle in https://github.com/mdelobelle/fileclass/pull/17
* docs: lead with a concrete example (README + docs intro) by @mdelobelle in https://github.com/mdelobelle/fileclass/pull/21
* compat: lower minAppVersion to 1.12.7 by @mdelobelle in https://github.com/mdelobelle/fileclass/pull/24
* fix: resolve "From a note" value source tolerantly + path autocomplete (#20) by @mdelobelle in https://github.com/mdelobelle/fileclass/pull/25


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdelobelle/fileclass/compare/0.0.3...0.0.4
